evals.name: orders-page-with-server-datagrid
evals.prompt: Build a /orders page with MudDataGrid using ServerData (with cancellation token), sortable columns (OrderId, CustomerName, Total $-formatted, CreatedAt yyyy-MM-dd), debounced search (300ms) by customer name, pagination (10/25/50/100), and a per-row View button that opens a confirmation dialog showing the order ID. OrderService.QueryAsync(skip, take, search, sortBy, descending, ct) is registered.

assertions.text: Orders.razor declares @page "/orders"
Orders.razor declares @rendermode InteractiveServer
Uses MudDataGrid<Order> with explicit T or inferred from Items/ServerData
ServerData delegate accepts CancellationToken (v9 signature) and passes it through to OrderService.QueryAsync
Toolbar has search MudTextField with DebounceInterval="300" wired to ReloadServerData
PropertyColumns for OrderId, CustomerName, Total (currency Format), CreatedAt (yyyy-MM-dd Format)
MudDataGridPager with PageSizeOptions including 10, 25, 50, 100
Action column with per-row View button that opens a dialog
Dialog opening uses await DialogService.ShowAsync (v9 async API)
A dialog .razor component is created (or inline dialog) showing the order ID

evals.name: create-product-form-with-validation
evals.prompt: Add a /products/new page with EditForm + DataAnnotations validation. Fields: Name (required, 3-100), SKU (required, regex ^[A-Z]{3}-\d{4}$), Price (required, > 0, currency), Category (Electronics/Clothing/Food), InStock (checkbox), Description (optional, max 500). On valid submit: call ProductService.CreateAsync, show success snackbar, reset form. On cancel: navigate to /products.

assertions.text: CreateProduct.razor declares @page "/products/new"
Uses <EditForm Model=...> (not MudForm)
Includes <DataAnnotationsValidator /> as a child of EditForm
Model has [Required] and [StringLength(100, MinimumLength = 3)] on Name
Model has [RegularExpression("^[A-Z]{3}-\\d{4}$")] on SKU
Model has [Range] on Price ensuring > 0
Model has [StringLength(500)] on Description
Submit button uses ButtonType="ButtonType.Submit"
MudBlazor inputs use For="@(() => model.X)" for validation wiring
OnValidSubmit handler calls ProductService.CreateAsync
After success, calls Snackbar.Add(...) with Severity.Success
After success, resets the model
Cancel button navigates to /products via NavigationManager

evals.name: custom-theme-with-dark-mode-toggle
evals.prompt: Update MainLayout.razor with a custom MudTheme (primary #0EA5E9, secondary #64748B, border radius 8px, drawer width 280px), follow OS dark-mode preference on first load, AppBar toggle button (sun/moon), persist choice to localStorage. All four providers in correct order. Existing layout has 'Acme Dashboard' AppBar and a drawer with Home/Users/Settings nav links.

assertions.text: MainLayout.razor includes <MudThemeProvider> with Theme bound to a custom theme field
Includes <MudPopoverProvider />
Includes <MudDialogProvider />
Includes <MudSnackbarProvider />
MudPopoverProvider appears BEFORE MudDialogProvider (critical v9 ordering rule)
Custom theme sets Primary = "#0EA5E9"
Custom theme sets Secondary = "#64748B"
Theme sets LayoutProperties.DefaultBorderRadius = "8px"
Theme sets LayoutProperties.DrawerWidthLeft = "280px"
Calls GetSystemDarkModeAsync() (v9 method) on first render
AppBar has a MudIconButton wired to a toggle handler with sun/moon icons
Toggle handler persists choice to localStorage via IJSRuntime
Preserves the 'Acme Dashboard' app name in the AppBar
Preserves the Home/Users/Settings NavLinks in the drawer
